description: KMC Engineering Module - Work Estimates, Tenders, POs, Invoices, Receipts
important_rules: c_status: 1=Active, 0=Inactive/Deleted. Always filter c_status=1 unless history is requested.
cancelled_status: 1=Cancelled, 0=Active. Filter cancelled_status=0 for active records.
Tender flow: kmc_work_estimate_hearder → engg_est_tender_master → engg_po_headers → engg_invoice_headers → engg_receipt_headers
Primary JOIN key between estimate and tender: estimate_header_id (kmc_work_estimate_hearder) → estimate_header_id (engg_est_tender_master)
Primary JOIN key across tender tables: tender_no (engg_est_tender_master.tender_no)
Primary JOIN key across PO tables: po_number (engg_po_headers.po_number)
file_no is a reference to estimate_file_creations table (external); use it as a filter key
estimate_header_id in kmc_work_estimate_hearder is unique per estimate work order
est_header_id in detail/distribution tables = estimate_header_id in kmc_work_estimate_hearder
DPR approval stages: SAE → AE → EE → DY_CE → DG (hierarchical approval chain)
dpr_status: INITIATED, PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED
concept_note_status: 0=Draft, 1=Submitted, 2=Approved, 3=Rejected
est_approval_status in estimate header: tracks current approval state
Bidder shortlisted_flag: Y=Shortlisted, N=Not shortlisted
bid_winner in engg_estimate_details_item_bid: 1=Winner, 0=Not winner
payment_status in receipt/invoice: 1=Paid, 0=Unpaid/Pending
po_type: WORKS=Works contract, SUPPLY=Supply contract, SERVICE=Service contract
tender_type: OPEN=Open tender, LIMITED=Limited tender, SINGLE=Single tender
bid_type: FINANCIAL=Financial bid, ENGINEERING=Engineering/item-rate bid
status_description column contains human-readable workflow status
borough and ward are location identifiers for work distribution
zone_no identifies the administrative zone for the work
department column stores department code responsible for the work
work_type: CIVIL, ELECTRICAL, MECHANICAL, etc.
fund_type: identifies budget funding source (SFC, CAP, etc.)
gst_type: CGST_SGST=local, IGST=inter-state
invoice bill flow: engg_invoice_headers (header) → engg_invoice_details (line items)
receipt flow: engg_receipt_headers (header) → engg_receipt_details (line items)
History tables (*_history) contain audit trail of bid changes
Rejected estimates are stored in rejected_kmc_work_estimate_details
Temp estimate tables (kmc_work_temp_*) hold draft estimates before finalization
Annexture estimate is additional/supplementary estimate linked to main estimate
CRN (Contractor Registration Number) details tracked in engg_tender_contractor_crn_details
EMD (Earnest Money Deposit) tracked in bidder payment tables

kmc_work_estimate_hearder.description: Main work estimate header — one row per work estimate/work order

estimate_header_id.desc: Unique estimate ID — used as FK in tender and detail tables

work_type.desc: Type of work: CIVIL, ELECTRICAL, MECHANICAL etc.

ward.desc: Ward number where work is located

work_purpose.desc: Purpose or objective of the work

total_job_value.desc: Total job value including all taxes

kmc_work_estimate_details.description: Line items of a work estimate — one row per item/activity

kmc_work_estimate_distributions.description: Budget distribution of work estimate across wards/boroughs

cost_centre_no.desc: Cost centre number for budget allocation

distributed_amount.desc: Amount allocated to this cost centre

engg_est_tender_master.description: Tender master — one row per tender linked to a work estimate

tender_no.desc: Unique tender number — primary key, FK in all tender child tables

engg_tender_bidders.description: Bidders who participated in a tender

engg_tender_contractor_crn_details.description: CRN (Contractor Registration Number) payment details for active tenders

eng_tender_bidder_payment_dtls.description: EMD/bid payment details made by bidders for tenders

eng_cancelled_tender_bidder_payment_dtls.description: EMD payment details for cancelled tenders

engg_engineering_bidding_details.description: Engineering/item-rate bid details submitted by contractors

engg_estimate_details_item_bid.description: Item-wise bid details and winner information per tender

engg_estimate_details_item_bid_history.description: Audit history of item bid changes

engg_financial_bidding_details.description: Financial bidding — overall bid value submitted by contractors per tender

engg_financial_bidding_details_history.description: Audit history of financial bidding changes

engg_po_headers.description: Purchase Order (PO) header — one row per PO issued after tender award

po_number.desc: Unique PO number — FK in all PO child tables

engg_po_item_bidding_details.description: PO line items — work items included in a PO

engg_po_estimation_details.description: Year-wise estimation values for PO items

estimation_value.desc: Estimated value for this PO item

engg_invoice_headers.description: Invoice (RA Bill) header — one row per invoice/bill submitted by contractor

engg_invoice_details.description: Invoice line items — work items billed in an invoice

engg_receipt_headers.description: Receipt/payment header — one row per payment made to contractor

engg_receipt_details.description: Receipt line items — items received/measured for payment

engg_concept_note.description: Concept note for proposed works (first stage of estimate workflow)

engg_file_transfer.description: File transfer log — tracks which user/department a file was transferred to

kmc_work_estimate_annexture_hearder.description: Annexture estimate header (supplementary estimate linked to main estimate)

rejected_kmc_work_estimate_details.description: Rejected estimate line items (moved here after rejection)

kmc_work_estimate_details_vendor.description: Vendor-based estimate details (rate sourced from vendor quotations)
